name: MiTAC Holdings Corporation
summary: MiTAC Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells computers and ancillary equipment, and communication related products. The company offers computer frames, motherboards, interface cards, displays, power supplies, keyboards, and related metal stamping and plastic parts, as well as provides maintenance services for motherboards. It is also involved in the research, development, and manufacture of computer software, and provision of related technical advisory services; and research and development of calculators, servers, mobile phones, and PDA and GPS products, as well as provision of technical transfer and advisory services. In addition, the company sells electronic telecommunication products, and communication and software products, as well as offers related after-sale services; and assembles and sells computer peripherals, hardware/software, and related products. Further, it engages in the testing, maintenance, and display of computers, computer components, communication products, and consumer electronic products, as well as provision of related technical advisory and after-sale services; and general investment activities. Additionally, the company offers freight transport agency, export and import trading, and warehousing services; customer data processing, analysis, and integrated services; and business administration services. It operates in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, and internationally. MiTAC Holdings Corporation was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
